---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What's the use case?**
Describe the problem or workflow you're trying to enable. Concrete is
better than abstract.

**Proposed solution**
Roughly what would the change look like — new flag, new field in the JSON,
new SDK call, etc.?

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them. Skip if
none.

**Scope check**
- [ ] Aligns with the project's "AI-driven payments on Hedera" focus
- [ ] Doesn't require a custodial wallet model
- [ ] Could be implemented without forking `hiero-sdk-go`

If any of these are unchecked, the feature may be out of scope. See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
